items.title: India’s app market is booming — but global platforms are capturing most of the gains
items.summary: Non-gaming apps, led by streaming and AI, are driving growth, even as India's spending per user lags global peers.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
